M-004.NAME: billing
M-004.owns: plans, subscriptions, per-plan device limits, payments and YooKassa integration

exports.fn-create_subscription: Activate subscription for user with plan limits
exports.fn-process_webhook: Handle YooKassa payment confirmation or failure
exports.fn-get_active_subscription: Return current subscription state for user
exports.fn-get_plan_limits: Return device limits and features for a plan
exports.fn-create-pending-trial: Create pending four-day trial access after verified email without starting countdown
exports.fn-activate-trial-on-first-vpn-handshake: Start pending trial exactly once from first observed VPN handshake
exports.fn-get-subscription-countdown: Return pending/active state and server-time remaining days/hours/minutes

phase-45-scope.primary-behaviors: pending trial lifecycle, idempotent first-handshake activation, paid subscription non-regression, device limit access for pending trial, and countdown API fields.
phase-45-scope.evidence: 2026-06-01: Phase-45 backend suite passed 35/35, including tests/test_trial_activation.py and updated billing tests.
